title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity.

title: A security vulnerability has been detected in CherryHQ cherry-studio up to 1.9.6. This...
description: A security vulnerability has been detected in CherryHQ cherry-studio up to 1.9.6. This vulnerability affects unknown code of the file src/main/services/mcp/oauth/callback.ts of the component MCP OAuth Local Callback Server. The manipulation of the argument code leads to improper authorization. The attack can be initiated remotely. The attack is considered to have high complexity. It is stated that the exploitability is difficult. The exploit has been disclosed publicly and may be used. The pull

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in CherryHQ cherry-studio up to version 1.9.6 allows improper authorization through the manipulation of the 'code' argument in the MCP OAuth Local Callback Server. While the exploitability is difficult and the attack complexity is high, the vulnerability could allow unauthorized access if exploited, potentially leading to data breaches or unauthorized actions within the application.
recommended_actions: Update CherryHQ cherry-studio to the latest patched version as soon as it becomes available.
Implement additional monitoring and logging for OAuth callback endpoints to detect and respond to any unauthorized access attempts.
Review and strengthen authorization mechanisms to ensure proper validation of the 'code' parameter in the affected component.

title: A security flaw has been discovered in Investintech SlimPDFReader up to 2.0.14. Affected by this...
description: A security flaw has been discovered in Investintech SlimPDFReader up to 2.0.14. Affected by this issue is the function SlimPDFReader!Investintech::PCV::TeighaDo+0x25cde0 of the file SlimPDFReader.exe of the component PDF File Handler. Performing a manipulation results in out-of-bounds read. It is possible to initiate the attack remotely. This vulnerability only affects products that are no longer supported by the maintainer.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows remote attackers to perform SQL injection, potentially leading to unauthorized access, data leakage, or database manipulation. If exploited, this could compromise sensitive information and disrupt operations.
recommended_actions: Immediately update or patch the SourceCodester Class and Exam Timetabling System to the latest version if available.
Implement input validation and sanitization to prevent SQL injection attacks on the 'course_year_section' parameter.
Monitor and audit database logs for any suspicious activity or unauthorized access attempts.

title: A vulnerability was determined in itsourcecode Hospital Management System 1.0. Affected is an...
description: A vulnerability was determined in itsourcecode Hospital Management System 1.0. Affected is an unknown function of the file /appointmentapproval.php of the component Appointment Handler. This manipulation of the argument editid causes sql injection. The attack is possible to be carried out remotely. The exploit has been publicly disclosed and may be utilized.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows for SQL injection via the 'editid' parameter in the Appointment Handler component. This could lead to unauthorized access to sensitive patient data, database manipulation, or system compromise. Since the exploit is publicly disclosed, the risk of exploitation is elevated.
recommended_actions: Immediately patch or update the Hospital Management System to the latest version if a fix is available.
Implement input validation and parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection vulnerabilities.
Monitor system logs for any unusual activity, especially related to /appointmentapproval.php, and implement a web application firewall (WAF) to block malicious requests.

title: A weakness has been identified in GPAC up to 26.02.0. This affects an unknown part of the file...
description: A weakness has been identified in GPAC up to 26.02.0. This affects an unknown part of the file src/utils/base_encoding.c of the component ISOBMFF Parser. Executing a manipulation can lead to highly compressed data. The attack needs to be launched locally. The exploit has been made available to the public and could be used for attacks. This patch is called 297f2d8d1f493d8b241330533cd47f7da758aeb3. A patch should be applied to remediate this issue. The vendor confirms: "We added a check on inflate

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The identified vulnerability in the ISOBMFF Parser of GPAC up to version 26.02.0 could allow local attackers to manipulate highly compressed data, potentially leading to data corruption or unexpected behavior. The exploit is publicly available, increasing the likelihood of misuse.
recommended_actions: Apply the vendor-provided patch (297f2d8d1f493d8b241330533cd47f7da758aeb3) immediately to mitigate the vulnerability.
Restrict local access to systems running vulnerable versions of GPAC to trusted users only.
Monitor public exploit repositories and security advisories for updates or new threats related to this vulnerability.

recommended_actions: Upgrade Databend to the latest version as soon as the patch is released and approved.
Implement network-level restrictions to limit access to the affected HTTP endpoints.
Monitor for unusual activity or unauthorized access attempts, and apply additional logging to the affected component.

title: CVE-2026-8157 - The Vitepos  WordPress plugin before 3.4.2 does not properly restrict the roles that can be assigned
description: The Vitepos  WordPress plugin before 3.4.2 does not properly restrict the roles that can be assigned when creating new users via one of its REST API endpoints, allowing authenticated users with a custom Vitepos  WordPress plugin before 3.4.2 role to escalate privileges to administrator.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows authenticated users with a custom role to escalate privileges to administrator via the REST API, potentially leading to full site compromise, data theft, or malicious modifications.
recommended_actions: Update the Vitepos WordPress plugin to version 3.4.2 or later immediately.
Audit all user roles and permissions to ensure no unauthorized privilege escalation has occurred.
Implement monitoring and logging for REST API activity to detect suspicious behavior.

title: CVE-2026-7859 - The Motors  WordPress plugin before 1.4.110 does not have proper authorisation and CSRF checks on on
description: The Motors  WordPress plugin before 1.4.110 does not have proper authorisation and CSRF checks on one of its AJAX actions, allowing unauthenticated attackers to modify arbitrary post metadata, such as the gallery, featured image and, on WooCommerce sites, product prices.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-7859.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the Transbank Webpay WordPress plugin allows unauthenticated attackers to execute Stored XSS attacks, potentially compromising administrator accounts. This can lead to unauthorized access, data theft, or further exploitation of the WordPress site.
recommended_actions: Update the Transbank Webpay WordPress plugin to version 1.14.0 or later to patch the vulnerability.
Implement a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to block malicious payloads targeting this vulnerability.
Regularly review and sanitize logs to ensure no malicious scripts are stored or executed.

description: The Pie Register  WordPress plugin before 3.8.4.10 does not use sufficiently random values when generating its account verification tokens, allowing unauthenticated attackers to predict a valid token and activate an account without access to the associated email inbox.

title: CVE-2026-6645 - An insecure process execution vulnerability exists in the pc-printer-updater.exe component of the Pa
description:
An insecure process execution vulnerability exists in the pc-printer-updater.exe component of the PaperCut Print Deploy Client for Windows. The application, which typically operates with high-level system privileges, attempts to perform an internal validation check by invoking a secondary system utility using an unqualified file reference.



Because the application does not specify an absolute path to this utility, it relies on the operating system's default search order to locate the executable. Under specific conditions, a local attacker with the ability to modify directories within the system's search path could plant a malicious binary that mimics the expected utility. This could result in the malicious code being executed with SYSTEM privileges, leading to a full compromise of the affected host.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-6645.

Security Update for Armoury Crate App ' section on the ASUS Security Advisory for more information.

title: CVE-2026-11748 - A vulnerability has been identified in centraldogma-server-auth-shiro versions prior to 0.84.0, wher
description: A vulnerability has been identified in centraldogma-server-auth-shiro versions prior to 0.84.0, where the SearchFirstActiveDirectoryRealm substitutes the login username into an LDAP search filter without neutralizing LDAP filter metacharacters, allowing an unauthenticated attacker to manipulate the filter to cause authentication confusion and enumerate the directory structure.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11748.

title: CVE-2026-11746 - A vulnerability has been identified in centraldogma-server versions prior to 0.84.0, where enabling
description: A vulnerability has been identified in centraldogma-server versions prior to 0.84.0, where enabling ZooKeeper replication without setting replication.secret causes the server to silently fall back to a hard-coded, publicly known secret. This default credential authenticates the embedded ZooKeeper ensemble, allowing an attacker with network access to read the full replication log or join the quorum and execute arbitrary replicated commands across the cluster.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11746.

title: CVE-2026-11745 - A vulnerability has been identified in centraldogma-server-mirror-git versions prior to 0.84.0, wher
description: A vulnerability has been identified in centraldogma-server-mirror-git versions prior to 0.84.0, where the Git mirror SSH client does not verify remote host keys for git+ssh:// connections, allowing an on-path attacker to perform man-in-the-middle attacks and compromise mirrored repositories.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11745.
